name: Caramel Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare the chocolate cake mix according to the package directions.
3. Pour two cups of batter into a greased 13x9-inch baking pan and bake for 15 minutes.
4. In a heavy saucepan, melt caramels and margarine with sweetened condensed milk over low heat, stirring until smooth.
5. Spread the caramel mixture evenly over the cake.
6. Spread any remaining cake batter over the caramel layer.
7. Top the cake with chopped pecans.
8. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool.
10. Garnish as desired.
